title: Atzlk's PMW
description: An optimized modpack made for ProtoManly's Weather Mod, used by Atzlk in his youtube videos.
body:
# Atzlk's PMW
### Overview
Atzlk's PMW is a modpack created by Atzlk, which contains the main mods I use in my YouTube videos. This modpack also contains: Addons, Optimizations & Performance Tweaks.

### Addons:
- PMW Extra!
- Modified Tornado Damage
- EAS Addon
- PMShaders

### Notes
_This modpack is unrelated to my PMWeather Minecraft Server (mc.atzlk.com), but this modpack is still compatible!_

### Socials
- [YouTube](https://youtube.com/@Atzlk)
- [Atzlk Hangout Discord](https://discord.gg/ekFVhdE7Cz)
- [mc.atzlk.com PMWeather Minecraft Server Discord](https://discord.gg/atzlk)
